data.body:
Done — fork commits 2262cba (DSO infra) + 1c736bf (orphan tickets branch). Evidence:

SC3 (DSO infra files baked, no TODO/TBD/<FILL IN>):
- CLAUDE.md, project-understanding.md, design-notes.md, .claude/ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md, .claude/dso-config.conf, .pre-commit-config.yaml, .github/workflows/ci.yml all created and content-complete
- dso-config.conf has dso.plugin_root= empty (installer fills at scaffold time per the SC3 contract)
- grep -rEn 'TODO|TBD|<FILL IN>' across DSO infra files = 0 matches

SC5 ({{PROJECT_NAME}} substitution works end-to-end):
- After fresh clone + simulated installer sed (s/{{PROJECT_NAME}}/demo-proto/g), residual {{PROJECT_NAME}} matches outside .git/ = 0
- package.json name field substitutes correctly: 'demo-proto'

SC1 (tickets orphan branch reachable via --no-single-branch clone):
- git clone --no-single-branch shows both origin/main and origin/tickets
- git ls-remote origin tickets returns ref 1c736bf117b7e1c24df0eeea39065b6911e38499

Also: replaced upstream Nava SECURITY.md with DSO contact info; rewrote upstream README.md for DSO+NextJS workflow; removed Nava-Strata CONTRIBUTING.md.
